specVerification.note: Verified against implementation-spec.json and original spec requirements

action: Visual comparison with Figma designs required when Figma MCP becomes available

notes.observation: Dark mode uses pseudo-element with before:py-24 (96px) on md+ breakpoints
notes.detail: Implementation uses md:before:py-24 which equals 96px, matching spec exactly

notes.observation: Mobile: 1 column, Tablet: max 2 columns, Desktop: respects attribute (1, 2, or 3)
notes.specRequirement: Mobile 1 column, tablets up to 2 columns
notes.detail: Grid classes correctly implement: grid-cols-1 (mobile), md:grid-cols-2 (tablet), lg:grid-cols-3 (desktop)

notes.observation: Image containers are completely hidden when no image is set
notes.specRequirement: if not added their rectangle won't show up
notes.detail: Conditional rendering in both TSX and PHP only shows image container when hasImage is true

passedChecks.detail: CSS Grid with gap-6 (24px) between cards, matching CardsCarousel pattern
1, 2, and 3 column layouts all render correctly with proper responsive behavior
Cards maintain equal height within rows via CSS Grid items-stretch default and flex-1 on content
Cards use bg-accent (neon-green by default) as specified
Dark mode applies charcoal background via pseudo-element, text inverts to white
Card titles and descriptions use text-charcoal for proper contrast on accent background
Uses text-header-5 (Anton font, 24px mobile, 28px desktop) with mb-4 spacing
Uses text-body with text-charcoal and mb-6 spacing, flex-1 for alignment
ThemeHeading component with headingSize=2 and 2-column layout
Cards use rounded-2xl (16px) matching CardsCarousel pattern
Charcoal background card uses rounded-3xl (24px) for larger container
py-10 (40px) mobile, sm:py-16 (64px) desktop
p-6 (24px) mobile, md:p-8 (32px) tablet+, matching CardsCarousel
mb-8 (32px) mobile, md:mb-16 (64px) desktop before grid
gap-6 (24px) between all cards, matching CardsCarousel spaceBetween
ThemeButton with variation='tertiary', arrow injected via 'after' prop
Arrow wrapper has group-hover:bg-charcoal group-hover:text-neon-green transition
mt-auto pushes button to bottom of card for consistent alignment
aspect-[4/3] matches ContentWithMedia single image pattern
object-cover with focal point support via object-position
Image container only renders when image.id is set (PHP) or hasImage is true
Single column (grid-cols-1) at all mobile widths
Max 2 columns (md:grid-cols-2) regardless of attribute setting
Respects columns attribute (lg:grid-cols-3 for 3-column)
section wrapper, h3 for card titles, proper heading hierarchy
Tertiary button has group-focus states matching hover
Both files produce identical HTML structure and class combinations

container.darkMode: relative before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-(--side-gutter) md:before:-inset-8 md:before:py-24

grid.implemented: grid gap-6 with conditional column classes

card.implemented: w-full h-full bg-accent rounded-2xl overflow-hidden flex flex-col

image.implemented: w-full h-full object-cover with focal point

button.implemented: ThemeButton variation=tertiary with arrow via after prop
button.className: btn-tertiary-arrow text-charcoal! text-left! group inline-flex items-center gap-2
button.arrowWrapper: shrink-0 inline-flex items-center justify-center w-6 h-6 rounded-full transition-all group-hover:bg-charcoal group-hover:text-neon-green

specComplianceMatrix.requirement: Each card should be an inner block
specComplianceMatrix.implementation: CardsGridItem is a registered inner block of CardsGrid

specComplianceMatrix.requirement: Card background should be accent color
specComplianceMatrix.implementation: bg-accent class applied to card container

specComplianceMatrix.requirement: Dark mode with charcoal card background
specComplianceMatrix.implementation: Pseudo-element with before:bg-charcoal following ContentWithMedia pattern

specComplianceMatrix.requirement: 96px padding on tablets and up in dark mode
Tertiary button with arrow via afterContent
specComplianceMatrix.implementation: ThemeButton with 'after' prop containing arrow icon in styled wrapper
CSS Grid with items-stretch (default) and flex layout in cards

specComplianceMatrix.requirement: Images only, rectangle hidden if not set
specComplianceMatrix.implementation: Conditional rendering: image container only shown when hasImage/image.id exists

recommendations: Connect Figma MCP server to complete visual comparison
Compare implementation screenshots against Figma desktop node 811-58775
Compare implementation screenshots against Figma mobile node 811-59472
conclusion: Design QA is INCOMPLETE. Spec verification passed - all requirements from the spec file are correctly implemented. However, visual comparison against Figma designs could not be performed because the Figma MCP server was unavailable. A follow-up visual comparison is required to verify pixel-level accuracy against the original Figma designs.
